limitations: The two axial_attention RowSelfAttention wrappers are held because their signatures and implementations omit upstream MINT module parameters, 4D MSA layout, row aggregation, projections, and mask semantics.
rotaryembedding_numpy is a NumPy replay of upstream torch semantics rather than an upstream-defined NumPy callable.
required_actions: Do not merge axial_attention rows into the shared manifest until RowSelfAttention is redesigned as a source-aligned parameterized module atom or explicitly re-scoped away from MINT RowSelfAttention.
Add shared REMEDIATION.md entries for both held axial_attention FQDNs with the remediation text from this review bundle.

rows.description: Apply average-product correction over the final two axes.
parameters: x: np.ndarray with at least two dimensions
rows.provenance: Matched to upstream mint/modules.py:32 apc implementation at commit 79a9956b80e221066a3007bb156e8e986cba6190.

rows.description: Generated torch scaled dot-product attention wrapper currently named like MINT RowSelfAttention.
limitations: Upstream MINT RowSelfAttention is an nn.Module over 4D tensors shaped (num_rows, num_cols, batch_size, embed_dim).
Current wrapper has no q_proj, k_proj, v_proj, out_proj weights and cannot reproduce learned RowSelfAttention behavior.
Current mask semantics differ: upstream raises for self_attn_mask and handles padding over MSA row/column axes.
required_actions: Replace with a source-aligned RowSelfAttention module/core API that accepts or owns q/k/v/out projection parameters and 4D MSA tensors.
Update CDG, witness metadata, and tests to cover upstream shape contract, projection behavior, row aggregation, padding masking, and batched-forward behavior.
Alternatively rename/re-scope this atom as generic scaled dot-product attention and do not cite MINT RowSelfAttention.
rows.provenance: Negative audit against upstream mint/axial_attention.py:12 RowSelfAttention at commit 79a9956b80e221066a3007bb156e8e986cba6190.

rows.description: Generated NumPy scaled dot-product attention wrapper currently named like MINT RowSelfAttention.
limitations: Upstream MINT has no NumPy RowSelfAttention implementation.
Current wrapper has no learned projections or 4D MSA row/column tensor contract.
Current padding-mask behavior is an approximation and is not substantiated by upstream MINT source.
required_actions: Either remove/re-scope as an independently documented generic NumPy attention helper or add an explicit source-aligned API with parameters matching upstream RowSelfAttention semantics.
Do not publish under the MINT RowSelfAttention claim without source-aligned behavior tests and documentation.
rows.provenance: Negative audit against upstream mint/axial_attention.py:12 RowSelfAttention at commit 79a9956b80e221066a3007bb156e8e986cba6190.

rows.description: Encode TCR CDR3/epitope distance matrices and validity masks.
io_specs: returns tuple[encoding float32, masking bool] shaped (len(mat_list), max_cdr3, max_epi)
rows.provenance: Matched to upstream downstream/TCR-Epitope/tcr-interface/teim_utils.py:309 encoding_dist_mat at commit 79a9956b80e221066a3007bb156e8e986cba6190.

rows.description: Decorate an nn.Module-style class with MINT/Fairseq incremental-state behavior.
io_specs: returns the same class object with FairseqIncrementalState prepended to bases
limitations: Like upstream MINT, dynamic __bases__ mutation is validated for nn.Module-style classes and may not work for arbitrary built-in/layout-incompatible classes.
rows.provenance: Matched to upstream mint/multihead_attention.py FairseqIncrementalState and with_incremental_state at commit 79a9956b80e221066a3007bb156e8e986cba6190.

rows.description: Apply MINT/RoFormer rotate-half rotary embedding to NumPy query/key arrays.
io_specs: returns tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray] preserving q/k shapes
limitations: NumPy variant is a deterministic replay of the upstream torch algorithm; upstream MINT only defines torch RotaryEmbedding.
rows.provenance: Matched to upstream mint/rotary_embedding.py rotate_half/apply_rotary_pos_emb/RotaryEmbedding at commit 79a9956b80e221066a3007bb156e8e986cba6190.

rows.description: Apply MINT/RoFormer rotate-half rotary embedding to torch query/key tensors.
io_specs: returns tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor] preserving q/k shapes
rows.provenance: Matched to upstream mint/rotary_embedding.py rotate_half/apply_rotary_pos_emb/RotaryEmbedding at commit 79a9956b80e221066a3007bb156e8e986cba6190.
